title: Getting Started with drizzle-orm — A Practical Guide for Database Developers
description: Step-by-step guide to getting started with drizzle-orm. Learn setup, configuration, and best practices for Database.

sourceData.name: drizzle-orm
sourceData.description: Drizzle ORM package for SQL databases

bodyHtml:
drizzle-orm is making waves in the Database ecosystem this week, gaining 11333.1k new stars. With a total of 35.0k stars on GitHub and 1.5k forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 35.0kStars
📈 +11333.1k/wkGrowth
🔀 1.5kForks
⚠️ 1.9kOpen Issues

Key Features

  • Written in JavaScript/TypeScript for maximum performance
  • Licensed under Apache-2.0 — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://orm.drizzle.team
  • 🏷️ drizzle
  • 🏷️ orm
  • 🏷️ pg
  • 🏷️ mysql
  • 🏷️ singlestore

Why drizzle-orm Is Trending

The Database landscape is constantly evolving, and drizzle-orm has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 11333.1k new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Drizzle ORM package for SQL databases

If you're working in Database, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Practical Use Cases

Here are some common scenarios where drizzle-orm shines:

  1. New projects: Start your next JavaScript/TypeScript project with this tool as a foundation
  2. Migration: Consider switching if your current solution is slowing you down
  3. Learning: Study the source code to understand modern Database patterns

Quick Start

Get started with drizzle-orm in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://www.npmjs.com/package/drizzle-orm # Navigate to project cd drizzle-orm # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

drizzle-orm is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
